category_id.description: The ID of the rubric category

grade.description: The grade assigned to the category, must be one of the listed grades for the rubric category

criterion_id.description: The ID of the criterion within the rubric category, must be one of the listed criteria for the rubric category

explanation.description: An explanation of the grade given

category_grades.description: A list of grades for each rubric category with explanations

overall_feedback.description: General feedback about the student's response, provided in HTML format and focused on how the student can improve according to the rubric
